<!--
Title format: conventional commit-style one-liner.
  feat(scope): ... | fix(scope): ... | perf(scope): ... | chore: ... | docs: ...
-->

## Summary
<!-- 1–3 bullets, "why" over "what". Diff shows what. -->

## Test plan
<!-- Bulleted checklist of how you (and a reviewer) verify this works. -->
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run type-check`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] Manual UI verification (only if user-facing) — describe steps

## Risk / Rollback
<!-- What could break, who's affected, how to revert. -->

## Related
<!-- Spec / plan / Linear / issue links if any. -->
